features.featureTitle: Fix the 2D map in the Travelogue panel so it renders correctly on the first button click without requiring a hard refresh. The map component likely mounts before its container dimensions or data are ready — ensure the Leaflet map is initialized only after its container is fully mounted and visible, and that it invalidates its size after becoming visible (e.g., via a resize/invalidateSize call triggered on mount or visibility change).

Fix the 2D map in the Travelogue panel so that when multiple journeys share the same city, markers from all those journeys are shown on the map — not just the markers from the first journey added for that city. The current deduplication or keying logic is discarding markers from subsequent journeys with the same city. Each journey's schedule items must produce their own distinct markers regardless of shared city names.
